description: An introduction to the geological processes that shape the ocean basins, oceanic plate creation and structure, hydrothermal circulation at mid-ocean ridges, bathymetry, ocean islands, different types of ocean margins, ocean sediments, the sedimentary record of past ocean circulation, coastal geology.

groupFilter1.name: School of Earth and Ocean Sciences

preAndCorequisites:
• Complete all of the following
    • Complete all of:
      • EOS120 - The Dynamic Earth (1.5)
    • Complete 1 of:
      • CHEM101 - Fundamentals of Chemistry from Atoms to Materials (1.5)
      • CHEM150 - Engineering Chemistry (1.5)
title: Introductory Geological Oceanography
